description_long: This is a rustic cabin complex nestled within a dense coniferous forest, featuring two main wooden structures with steep, dark gabled roofs. The larger cabin is centrally located and has a prominent front entrance, while the smaller structure sits nearby, partially obscured by trees. The cabins are surrounded on all sides by tall, snow-dusted pine trees, creating a secluded woodland setting. The roofs are pitched and appear to be made of dark shingles, contrasting with the natural wood siding of the buildings. Windows are visible on the front and sides of the cabins, with a mix of small and medium rectangular panes. The overall scene evokes a tranquil, remote retreat, blending harmoniously with the forest environment.
description: A pair of rustic wooden cabins with steep gabled roofs, surrounded by dense, snow-covered pine trees in a secluded forest setting.
description_view_0: The front view shows both cabins clearly, with the main entrance and windows visible, framed by dense pine trees.
description_view_1: From the rear, the cabins are mostly obscured by the forest, with only the rooftops and a small portion of the structures visible.
description_view_2: The side view highlights the main cabin's gabled roof and the thick forest cover, with the smaller cabin partially hidden.
description_view_3: This view shows the cabins from the opposite side, with the roofs and some windows visible through the trees, emphasizing the forest density.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with dark shingle covering
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple small to medium rectangular windows, asymmetrically distributed on the front and sides of both cabins, with no clear pattern or grouping.
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade of the larger cabin; possible secondary door on the smaller cabin, partially visible from the front.
